title: Hardcoded user-facing string in SetError/SetMessage
description: SetError() or SetMessage() is called with a literal English string instead of $this->Lang().
explanation: Hardcoded English strings in UI methods prevent localization and make string management inconsistent. CMSMS provides $this->Lang() backed by lang/ files.
fix: Add the string to lang/en_US.php and reference via $this->Lang('key').

examples.bad: $this->SetError('The item could not be saved to the database.');
